full_text:
Approximately 1.5 cm tissue piece was minced and dissociated in 20 ml of AdF++ medium containing 400 ul of 50U/ml dispase and 200ul of RNAse free DNAse, according to the protocol.

Final cell pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of AdF++ medium

Cell count 1):

total: 9.20 E5

live: 3.73 E5

viability: 62.3 %

Size: 9.7 um

Cell count 2):

total: 9.45 E5

live: 5.52 E5

viability: 58.50 %

Size: 9.6 um

Cell count: 9.32 E5 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

Total cell count: 9.32 E5

The cell count was low for 384 well plates. 48-well plate culture (18 wells were used) was prepared. Flow Cytometry was done on day 0 sample.

On day 7, the cultures from 48 well plates were taken (- a total of 18 wells). The cultures from 9 wells were taken for flow cytometry and the cultures from the remaining 9 wells were processed for scRNA sequencing and stored in stemcell banker.
